events.title: Check-In
events.details: 996 Skyland Dr, Zephyr Cove, NV 89448. Get settled, claim your bed, take in the lake.

events.title: Quick Supply Run
events.details: Grab drinks, breakfast food for the weekend, and any essentials. Keep it fast — big night ahead.

events.title: Get Dressed
events.details: Business casual to semi-formal tonight. The Edge requires it. Look sharp.

events.title: Depart for Edgewood
events.details: Allow extra time — valet parking only at Edgewood. The entire party must be present to be seated.

events.title: Pre-Dinner Drinks — The Edge Lounge
events.details: Arrive early and gather at the lounge. Lakefront fire pit, handcrafted cocktails, and views straight across the water.

events.title: Dinner at The Edge — Edgewood Tahoe
events.details: Farm-to-table contemporary American. Lakefront views, vaulted ceilings, glowing fire pit. The send-off dinner. Cashless — credit card only. 20% gratuity added for parties of 6+.

events.title: Back to Base
events.details: Return to the house. Night is young.

events.title: Lakeside Bonfire
events.details: Drinks, fire, stories, and the appropriate roasting of the groom.

events.title: Breakfast at the House
events.details: Cook together. Eggs, coffee, the works. High of 52°F today — good day ahead.

events.title: Lake Time
events.details: Walk the shore, dock session, take in Zephyr Cove. Bring layers — crisp but gorgeous.

events.title: Lunch
events.details: Back at the house. Fuel up for the afternoon.

events.title: Halo 3 LAN Party
events.details: Multi-TV setup, everyone in. The main event. Bracket style or free-for-all — sort it out on the day.

events.title: Open Gaming & Cards
events.details: Smash, MTG, pool, whatever. Jump in and out as you please.

events.title: Hang & Drinks
events.details: Wind down before dinner. Good time to get outside if the weather holds.

events.title: Grill Night
events.details: Fire up the grill. Saturday dinner at the house. Cold outside, warm inside.

events.title: Championship Finals
events.details: Wrap up any open tournaments. Crown the winners. Update the leaderboard.

events.title: Send-Off
events.details: Last night together. Make it count.

events.title: Breakfast & Clean Up
events.details: Final breakfast together. Clean the house. Check-out is firm at 10:00 AM.

events.title: Morning Walk (Optional)
events.details: One last look at the lake. High of 45°F — bring a jacket.

events.title: Check-Out
events.details: Keys returned by 10:00 AM sharp. Load the cars.

events.title: Drive to Roseville
events.details: ~1.5–2 hrs via Hwy 50 west. Topgolf is right on the way home — barely a detour.

events.title: Topgolf — Roseville
events.details: 1700 Freedom Way, Roseville, CA. Book 2 side-by-side bays in advance. $37/hr per bay noon–5pm, up to 6 players per bay. Clubs provided.

events.title: Head Home
events.details: Final send-off. See you at the wedding.
